data.body: Plan-review PASS (blocking=0), signed at HEAD 07183a26; claimed immediately per the stale-attestation stopgap. Triaged all 9 advisories (all valid, remediated post-claim): (1+2) P6/P9 ac-quality+file_impact — set_file_impact + tightened 'clean' wording. (3) E1/F1 parity — added a golden-fixture parity AC (workflow == completion.py verdict). (4) T4 expand-contract — stated completion.py path stays live; cutover is B5. (5) T5e ADR — added a workflow-as-gate design-note deliverable. (6) F4 beneficiary — named rebar maintainers/engine. (7) E5 failure-paths — added ACs for short-circuit/FAIL-findings/citation-downgrade tests. (8) G6 short-circuit [KEY] — redesigned: completion.py:223-225 SHORT-CIRCUITS (precheck fail -> deterministic FAIL, skips LLM); workflow now gates the prompt with if: !precheck_failed instead of a naive linear chain. (9) G6 no-sign-helper [KEY] — completion.py has no signer; B3 produces the verdict and does NOT sign (signing deferred to B5 close-gate).
